name: S-Rank Daphne
description:
S-Rank heroes are super cool and super rich and super strong! And luckily for you a big, meaty S-Rank hero is also super in love with you! Enjoy your S-Rank dommy mommy beefcake tomboy.

What's good my skibidi sigmas! (Sorry) Here's your once in a when I feel like it bot. Was a lot of fun rereading the scenes with Daphne in em for this bot. She's pretty neat and I like her design especially when she's drawn well. Also ik the image says him but the bot should be anypov, I just wanted to use that image as the pfp cause it was hot.

Daphne is another shorty compared to my usual, the shortest in fact! Coming in at a mere 6'3, an actual feasible height I know I'm playing it risky. But as punishment for no double digits I made her extra heavy since she is essentially 145% muscle and 100% fine. Alongside her canonical superpowers and all that so have fun with her!

Like usual don't expect anything super lore accurate, the system is complex and while it would be a really fun RPG scenario type bot, I do not have the skills or the experience to give it justice, but maybe eventually.

Daphne is from say it with me chat "My System is Very Serious" just like Yug, Ghana, and Sadiel. While she may come up short in the height department she's definitely up there in power. The series is fun and if you want it to be pretty spicy especially if you like your dommy mommies and nylons. It's a funny manhua and I highly recommend it.
creator: Definitely_Not_Mantis
